club.name: Club
club.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d4 bludgeoning, light. A stout length of wood.

dagger.name: Dagger
dagger.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d4 piercing, finesse, light, thrown (range 20/60).

greatclub.name: Greatclub
greatclub.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d8 bludgeoning, two-handed. An oversize club.

handaxe.name: Handaxe
handaxe.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d6 slashing, light, thrown (range 20/60).

light_hammer.name: Light Hammer
light_hammer.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d4 bludgeoning, light, thrown (range 20/60).

mace.name: Mace
mace.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d6 bludgeoning. A flanged metal head on a haft.

quarterstaff.name: Quarterstaff
quarterstaff.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d6 bludgeoning, versatile (1d8 two-handed — the engine always rolls the one-handed die).

sickle.name: Sickle
sickle.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d4 slashing, light. A reaping tool with a curved blade.

spear.name: Spear
spear.description: Simple melee weapon, 1d6 piercing, thrown (range 20/60), versatile (1d8 two-handed — the engine always rolls the one-handed die).

light_crossbow.name: Light Crossbow
light_crossbow.description: Simple ranged weapon, 1d8 piercing, ammunition (range 80/320; bolt), loading, two-handed. Range and loading are not modeled.

dart.name: Dart
dart.description: Simple ranged weapon, 1d4 piercing, finesse, thrown (range 20/60).

shortbow.name: Shortbow
shortbow.description: Simple ranged weapon, 1d6 piercing, ammunition (range 80/320; arrow), two-handed. Range is not modeled.

sling.name: Sling
sling.description: Simple ranged weapon, 1d4 bludgeoning, ammunition (range 30/120; bullet). Range is not modeled.

battleaxe.name: Battleaxe
battleaxe.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 slashing, versatile (1d10 two-handed — the engine always rolls the one-handed die).

flail.name: Flail
flail.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 bludgeoning. A spiked ball on a chain.

glaive.name: Glaive
glaive.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d10 slashing, heavy, reach, two-handed. Reach is not modeled.

greataxe.name: Greataxe
greataxe.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d12 slashing, heavy, two-handed.

greatsword.name: Greatsword
greatsword.description: Martial melee weapon, 2d6 slashing, heavy, two-handed.

halberd.name: Halberd
halberd.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d10 slashing, heavy, reach, two-handed. Reach is not modeled.

lance.name: Lance
lance.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d10 piercing, heavy, reach, two-handed (unless mounted). Reach and mounted use are not modeled.

longsword.name: Longsword
longsword.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 slashing, versatile (1d10 two-handed — the engine always rolls the one-handed die). A classic straight, double-edged blade.

maul.name: Maul
maul.description: Martial melee weapon, 2d6 bludgeoning, heavy, two-handed. A massive two-handed hammer.

morningstar.name: Morningstar
morningstar.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 piercing. A spiked steel ball on a haft.

pike.name: Pike
pike.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d10 piercing, heavy, reach, two-handed. Reach is not modeled.

rapier.name: Rapier
rapier.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 piercing, finesse. A slender, sharply pointed dueling blade.

scimitar.name: Scimitar
scimitar.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d6 slashing, finesse, light. A curved single-edged blade.

shortsword.name: Shortsword
shortsword.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d6 piercing, finesse, light.

trident.name: Trident
trident.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 piercing, thrown (range 20/60), versatile (1d10 two-handed — the engine always rolls the one-handed die).

war_pick.name: War Pick
war_pick.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 piercing, versatile (1d10 two-handed — the engine always rolls the one-handed die).

warhammer.name: Warhammer
warhammer.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d8 bludgeoning, versatile (1d10 two-handed — the engine always rolls the one-handed die).

whip.name: Whip
whip.description: Martial melee weapon, 1d4 slashing, finesse, reach. Reach is not modeled.

blowgun.name: Blowgun
blowgun.description: Martial ranged weapon, 1 piercing, ammunition (range 25/100; needle), loading. Range and loading are not modeled.

hand_crossbow.name: Hand Crossbow
hand_crossbow.description: Martial ranged weapon, 1d6 piercing, ammunition (range 30/120; bolt), light, loading. Range and loading are not modeled.

heavy_crossbow.name: Heavy Crossbow
heavy_crossbow.description: Martial ranged weapon, 1d10 piercing, ammunition (range 100/400; bolt), heavy, loading, two-handed. Range and loading are not modeled.

longbow.name: Longbow
longbow.description: Martial ranged weapon, 1d8 piercing, ammunition (range 150/600; arrow), heavy, two-handed. Range is not modeled.

musket.name: Musket
musket.description: Martial ranged weapon, 1d12 piercing, ammunition (range 40/120; bullet), loading, two-handed. Range and loading are not modeled.

pistol.name: Pistol
pistol.description: Martial ranged weapon, 1d10 piercing, ammunition (range 30/90; bullet), loading. Range and loading are not modeled.

padded_armor.name: Padded Armor
padded_armor.description: Light armor, AC 11 + Dex modifier (modeled as +1 over the 10+DEX base). SRD: disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks (GM-adjudicated).

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.description: Light armor, AC 11 + Dex modifier (modeled as +1 over the 10+DEX base).

studded_leather_armor.name: Studded Leather Armor
studded_leather_armor.description: Light armor, AC 12 + Dex modifier (modeled as +2 over the 10+DEX base).

hide_armor.name: Hide Armor
hide_armor.description: Medium armor, AC 12 + Dex modifier (max 2); modeled as +2 over the uncapped 10+DEX base — the Dex cap is not modeled.

chain_shirt.name: Chain Shirt
chain_shirt.description: Medium armor, AC 13 + Dex modifier (max 2); modeled as +3 over the uncapped 10+DEX base — the Dex cap is not modeled.

scale_mail.name: Scale Mail
scale_mail.description: Medium armor, AC 14 + Dex modifier (max 2); modeled as +4 over the uncapped 10+DEX base — the Dex cap is not modeled. SRD: disadvantage on Stealth checks (GM-adjudicated).

breastplate.name: Breastplate
breastplate.description: Medium armor, AC 14 + Dex modifier (max 2); modeled as +4 over the uncapped 10+DEX base — the Dex cap is not modeled.

half_plate_armor.name: Half Plate Armor
half_plate_armor.description: Medium armor, AC 15 + Dex modifier (max 2); modeled as +5 over the uncapped 10+DEX base — the Dex cap is not modeled. SRD: disadvantage on Stealth checks (GM-adjudicated).

ring_mail.name: Ring Mail
ring_mail.description: Heavy armor, AC 14 (no Dex modifier). SRD: disadvantage on Stealth checks (GM-adjudicated).

chain_mail.name: Chain Mail
chain_mail.description: Heavy armor, AC 16 (no Dex modifier). SRD: requires Str 13 and gives disadvantage on Stealth checks (GM-adjudicated).

splint_armor.name: Splint Armor
splint_armor.description: Heavy armor, AC 17 (no Dex modifier). SRD: requires Str 15 and gives disadvantage on Stealth checks (GM-adjudicated).

plate_armor.name: Plate Armor
plate_armor.description: Heavy armor, AC 18 (no Dex modifier). SRD: requires Str 15 and gives disadvantage on Stealth checks (GM-adjudicated).

shield.name: Shield
shield.description: Shield, +2 AC while wielded. Occupies one hand (two-handed weapons conflict with it).

potion_of_healing.name: Potion of Healing
potion_of_healing.description: A small vial of red liquid that glimmers when agitated. Drinking it restores 2d4+2 hit points.

potion_of_greater_healing.name: Potion of Greater Healing
potion_of_greater_healing.description: A vial of bright red liquid. Drinking it restores 4d4+4 hit points.

potion_of_superior_healing.name: Potion of Superior Healing
potion_of_superior_healing.description: A vial of vivid red liquid. Drinking it restores 8d4+8 hit points.

potion_of_supreme_healing.name: Potion of Supreme Healing
potion_of_supreme_healing.description: A vial of brilliant red liquid. Drinking it restores 10d4+20 hit points.
